mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER (USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_NAME, NICKNAME, ENABLED) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, #{nickname}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT M.USERID, M.USERPW, M.USERNAME, M.NICKNAME, M.ENABLED, M.JOB, M.BIO, M.TECH_TAGS, M.USER_IMG, M.LINK1, M.LINK2, M.LINK3, A.USERID AS AUTH_USERID, A.AUTH FROM TBL_MEMBER M LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_AUTH A ON M.USERID = A.USERID WHERE M.USERID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET USER_IMG = #{userImg}, UPDATEDATE = SYSDATE WHERE USERID = #{userId}

UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET USERNAME = #{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NICKNAME = #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOB = #{job, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIO = #{bio, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TECH_TAGS = #{techTags, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_IMG = #{userImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LINK1 = #{link1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LINK2 = #{link2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LINK3 = #{link3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATEDATE = SYSDATE WHERE USERID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT bno, title, regdate, 'BOARD' as type FROM tbl_board WHERE writer = #{memberId} ORDER BY bno DESC

choose.when: SELECT bno as "bno", title as "title", regdate as "activityDate", viewcnt as "viewCnt", replycnt as "replyCnt", '게시글' as "categoryName" FROM tbl_board WHERE writer = #{userId} ORDER BY regdate DESC

SELECT DISTINCT b.bno as "bno", r.reply as "title", r.replydate as "activityDate", b.viewcnt as "viewCnt", b.replycnt as "replyCnt", '댓글활동' as "categoryName" FROM tbl_reply r JOIN tbl_board b ON r.bno = b.bno WHERE r.replyer = #{userId} ORDER BY r.replydate DESC
choose.otherwise: SELECT bno as "bno", title as "title", regdate as "regdate", viewcnt as "viewCnt", replycnt as "replyCnt", '게시글' as "categoryName" FROM tbl_board WHERE writer = #{userId} ORDER BY regdate DESC
